summary: Iteration 7 end-to-end test of USD pricing, WC-only predictions, referral system, prize-pool admin PATCH + contributions, signup w/ ref code, and frontend USD conversion. 15/15 backend tests PASS. Frontend mostly PASS — all USD conversion (cards, wallet, premium) works; referrals signed-in page works (code, copy, stat cards INVITED/ACTIVE/SPEND/CREDIT); footer Lagos removed; WC-only predictions empty state correct; mobile drawer has Invite & Earn. Minor: the path mentioned in the requirements is `/legend-cards` but the actual registered route in App.js is `/cards` (header link uses /cards correctly). No critical bugs found.

ui_bugs.issue: Requirements/header label uses 'Legend Cards' and request specifies path '/legend-cards', but App.js only registers '/cards'. Direct navigation to '/legend-cards' shows React Router warning 'No routes matched location /legend-cards' — page renders empty (only header + footer + InterstitialAd). The header anchor itself correctly routes to '/cards'.
Referral pool shows '$5000.00' without thousands separator. Cosmetic; spec says $5,000.

Bet9ja interstitial overlays the page on EVERY navigation and intercepts clicks on form submit buttons (signin form unable to submit while open). Auto-dismiss is needed or it should not appear on signin/auth flows. Tests had to bypass by using the /api/auth/signin endpoint directly.

action_items: Either add '/legend-cards' as an alias route in App.js, or update requirement docs to use '/cards' (preferred since header already links to /cards).
Format USD amounts with thousands separator in PrizePool display (e.g. '$5,000.00' not '$5000.00').
Consider not showing the Bet9ja InterstitialAd on /signin and /signup, or auto-dismiss after timeout — it currently blocks user form submission.
(Optional) Add data-testid='menu-referrals' on the desktop header dropdown link to /referrals (only data-testid='drawer-referrals' is currently rendered for mobile).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend code looks solid — pool contribution math (50%) and referrer credit (10%) verified via Create→GET pattern with delta assertions on amount_usd_cents.
public_user model correctly exposes referral_code (8-char Crockford Base32, verified subset of '23456789ABCDEFGHJKMNPQRSTUVWXYZ').
Predictions endpoint correctly returns scope='world_cup_2026' and 403 on POST to non-WC matches with detail 'Predictions are only available for FIFA World Cup 2026 matches.'
Admin PATCH /api/prize-pools/:id correctly enforces auth (non-admin gets 401/403) and persists amount_usd_cents + payout_structure (list form).
Frontend referral page is well-built: copies code, stat cards render INVITED/ACTIVE/THEIR SPEND/CREDIT with USD formatting.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7.py (new file, 15 pytest cases — kept the existing test_iteration3.py / test_iteration5.py / backend_test.py untouched)
test_credentials: admin@cloudypitch.com / CloudyAdmin2026!  (also created ephemeral testuser-<hex>@example.com / TestPass123! during tests)
seed_data_creation: Test runs create 1-2 testuser-<hex>@example.com accounts per session via signup with referral_code; 2-3 TEST_REF_* and TEST_RC_* card_transactions / contributions rows; modifies pool-wc2026-fantasy.amount_usd_cents (test PATCH set it to 5,000,000 cents = $50,000). Recommend admin cleanup if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7.py pass. Backend signin endpoint is POST /api/auth/signin (NOT /login). /api/auth/me returns {'user': {...}} not the user directly — unwrap via .get('user'). The /legend-cards path mentioned in iteration 7 spec doesn't exist — use /cards. The InterstitialAd consistently blocks UI form submits in Playwright — best to use page.request.post on /api/auth/signin to establish session cookie, then navigate. Pool-referrals seed exists with amount_usd_cents=500000. Referral code format is 8-char Crockford Base32 ('23456789ABCDEFGHJKMNPQRSTUVWXYZ').
rca_of_the_issue: The /legend-cards 'empty page' observed during testing is NOT a real bug — it's a path that was never registered in App.js. The Legend Cards page is registered at /cards. React Router silently rendered Layout + InterstitialAd when no route matched. Confirmed by grep: line 42 of /app/frontend/src/App.js: <Route path='/cards' element={<LegendCards />} />.
